content:
I was doing the story, and out of nowhere a character asked me about another character i never met with some implied importance. 
The lack of context got me super confused, so much so that i had to go look for it online, only to find that i was suposed to have read the deepdive for that character. Anyway, is there a post or sheet with the reading order to Morimens story and side content?
thread_title: Is there an official release order?
